title: Fleet Operations (Fleet Data & Digital)
description:
The intern will be attached to the Fleet Digital section and will support the team in the following activities: 

  • Extract and analyze sets of data from multiple sources and database for Harbour Launch, Tugs and Crew Deployment; develop and test hypothesis and communicate with section managers recommendations. 

  • Identify and interpret trends or patterns in the collected data sets. 

  • Detect anomalies, spot discrepancies and possible defects from our Fleet Management System 

  • Produce insights on operations data using analytic tools (Python/Excel/Power BI) 

  • Design, develop and maintain ongoing reports and dashboards. 

  • Take in the lead in digitalization projects by working with key stakeholders within and outside of organization. 

  • Perform any other ad-hocs duties as assigned. 


Preferred Skills

  • Proficiency in Python Programming Language and Excel VBA 

  • Experience in UI/UX designing and able to develop dashboard with data visualization tools (Example: Power BI and Tableau) 

  • Analytical mindset driven to understand machinery and operation data 

  • Strong organizational and problem-solving skills 

  • Commitment to learning including new analytical methods and Harbour Craft profile 

  • Ability to identify data-driven insights and trends from large data sets, keeping in mind of data quality and accuracy 

  • Able to develop Robotics Process Automation (RPA) – UiPath would be a plus.

postedCompany.description:
We are PSA Marine, a leader in the maritime sector since 1964. From our early days as the Port of Singapore Authority to corporatisation as PSA Marine, we have played a vital role in Singapore’s growth as the world’s busiest container transhipment hub. Over the years, our business portfolio has expanded beyond core businesses – Towage and Pilotage, to marine advisory, ship-to-ship transfer, navigational audit, water supply by waterboat, crew transfer in the offshore wind industry, and training and consultancy services.


With our team of 1,800 dedicated employees and modern fleet of more than 70 tugs, we have a presence in Peru, Europe, Bangladesh, China (including Hong Kong and Taiwan), India, Oman, and Southeast Asia today.


We are committed to deliver only the best as we continue to be alongside our customers and stakeholders in every leg of their journey. Our commitment to excellence fuels our zeal to innovate and define the future of maritime for the generations ahead.
postedCompany.name: PSA MARINE (PTE) LTD

districts.location: D05 Clementi New Town, Hong Leong Garden, Pasir Panjang
